project_type: Knowledge base repository for food law AI assistant with Python scraping scripts and Markdown content
build_system: pip for Python scripts, will use pnpm + Astro for website
build_command: cd website && pnpm build (for website); pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt (for scripts)
verification_instructions: 1. For website: run pnpm build in website/ and confirm static output generated. 2. For scripts: run pytest in scripts/ directory. 3. For workflow: validate YAML syntax.
setup_instructions: 1. pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt (Python scripts). 2. For website: cd website && pnpm install
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js 22 available, Python 3.11 default, pnpm available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: Python scripts: PEP 8, argparse CLI, docstrings, error handling with logging. Dependencies in scripts/requirements.txt. Branch-based workflow preferred.
key_patterns: Scripts follow pattern: argparse CLI, logging setup, requests-based HTTP with retry logic, BeautifulSoup for parsing, JSON/Markdown output. User-Agent header: foodlaw-ai/1.0. Existing scripts have retry with exponential backoff in fetch_eurlex_judgments.py and fetch_cbosa.py. CONTRIBUTING.md requires PEP 8, argparse interface, error handling.
directory_structure: Root: README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE, .gitignore, .env.example. scripts/: Python scrapers + requirements.txt + tests/. .github/workflows/: update-laws.yml. guidance/: Q&A markdown files. orzecznictwo/: case law (nsa/, wsa/, tsue/, gis-decyzje/). przepisy/: legislation references. skills/: AI skill definitions. docs/: technical documentation. website/ (to be created): Astro landing page.
